sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n68319" key="mo/lginos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μόλγῐνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">η</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n68319.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">made of ox-hide</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">φυσητῆρες</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theodorid.</author> </bibl> </cit> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:10:187" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.187</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
